channel.title: opensource on Oleksandr Kulbida
channel.description: Recent content in opensource on Oleksandr Kulbida

item.title: 16 GitHub repos every AI engineer should know in 2026
item.description: If you’re building AI systems in production — or just getting started — these repos are worth bookmarking. LLM Serving & Inference vLLM (66k+ stars) — The industry standard for high-throughput LLM serving. Continuous batching and maximum GPU utilization. If you’re serving LLMs in production, this is probably what you should be using. Ollama (162k+ stars) — The easiest way to run LLMs locally. Great for fast experimentation before you commit to a cloud setup.

item.title: Kubecon2021
item.description: Full list of videos from KubeCon 2021 Europe https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLj6h78yzYM2MqBm19mRz9SYLsw4kfQBrC
